languages.text: Разведчики долго петляют в огромных, пустых туннелях, посылая в центральную рубку редкие и преимущественно безсобытийные доклады, пока связь с одной из первых групп не прерывается. Волны вокс-канала просто перестают улавливать нужную частоту.

The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the bridge, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.
languages.original_text: Разведчики долго петляют в огромных, пустых туннелях, посылая в центральную рубку редкие и преимущественно безсобытийные доклады, пока связь с одной из первых групп не прерывается. Волны вокс-канала просто перестают улавливать нужную частоту.

traits.locale_text: The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the bridge, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.

The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the bridge, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.

The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the central control room, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.

The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the bridge, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.

The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the bridge, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.

languages.text: スカウトたちは巨大なトンネルをさまよい、長い間、中央の制御室に報告を送り続けた。しかし、最初のグループの通信が途絶えた。ボイスはもはや正しい周波数を拾えなくなった。
languages.original_text: The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the central control room, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.

traits.locale_text: スカウトたちは巨大なトンネルをさまよい、長い間、中央の制御室に報告を送り続けた。しかし、最初のグループの通信が途絶えた。ボイスはもはや正しい周波数を拾えなくなった。

languages.text: Los exploradores recorren los enormes túneles vacíos durante mucho tiempo, enviando informes infrecuentes y por lo general sin nada que declarar, hasta que uno de los primeros grupos pierde el contacto. Sencillamente, el voco no capta la frecuencia correcta.
languages.original_text: The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the bridge, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.

traits.locale_text: Los exploradores recorren los enormes túneles vacíos durante mucho tiempo, enviando informes infrecuentes y por lo general sin nada que declarar, hasta que uno de los primeros grupos pierde el contacto. Sencillamente, el voco no capta la frecuencia correcta.

languages.text: 考察队在巨大而空荡的隧道中徘徊良久，向舰桥发回的报告稀疏且平常……直到一支先遣队的通讯突然中断，音阵再也无法捕捉到正确的信号频率。
languages.original_text: The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the bridge, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.

traits.locale_text: 考察队在巨大而空荡的隧道中徘徊良久，向舰桥发回的报告稀疏且平常……直到一支先遣队的通讯突然中断，音阵再也无法捕捉到正确的信号频率。

languages.text: Die Späher streifen lange Zeit durch die riesigen, leeren Gänge und versorgen die Brücke mit unregelmäßigen und ereignislosen Berichten, bis der Kontakt mit einer der ersten Gruppen plötzlich abbricht. Das Vox kann die korrekte Frequenz einfach nicht mehr empfangen.
languages.original_text: The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the bridge, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.

traits.locale_text: Die Späher streifen lange Zeit durch die riesigen, leeren Gänge und versorgen die Brücke mit unregelmäßigen und ereignislosen Berichten, bis der Kontakt mit einer der ersten Gruppen plötzlich abbricht. Das Vox kann die korrekte Frequenz einfach nicht mehr empfangen.

languages.text: İzciler, uzun bir süre bu devasa, boş tünellerde dolaşıyor. Köprüye seyrek ve çoğunlukla sıradan raporlar gönderiyorlar. Sonrasında ilk gruplardan biriyle iletişim kesiliyor. Voks, doğru frekansı yakalayamaz hâle geliyor.
languages.original_text: The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the bridge, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.

traits.locale_text: İzciler, uzun bir süre bu devasa, boş tünellerde dolaşıyor. Köprüye seyrek ve çoğunlukla sıradan raporlar gönderiyorlar. Sonrasında ilk gruplardan biriyle iletişim kesiliyor. Voks, doğru frekansı yakalayamaz hâle geliyor.

languages.text: Les éclaireurs se lancent dans l'exploration des immenses tunnels vides, envoyant des rapports sporadiques à la passerelle, jusqu'à ce que la communication avec l'un des premiers groupes soit coupée. Le vox semble incapable de trouver la bonne fréquence.
languages.original_text: The scouts wander through the huge, empty tunnels for a long time, sending infrequent and mostly uneventful reports back to the bridge, until communication with one of the first groups is cut off. The vox simply can no longer pick up the right frequency.
